event_comments:
We had items left behind at the meet site. Black long-sleeve tech shirt with Major Taylor Project logo. Green jacket with Overlake logo. Warmup pants and water bottle in the team tent area. Email info@cascadeoc.org for retrieval or we will bring them to the next meet.
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Result Status Codes
msp: missing punch
dnf: did not finish
nc: not competing
dq: disqualified
ovt: overtime
dns: did not start
<time>* indicates course completion status was not reported and may be valid, msp, or dnf
